description.s: Item search functionality used throughout Hobson. Provides both a search function and a reusable search UI widget. All search evaluates on Enter (not on every keystroke).
Two modes: filter syntax (text-based) and Hob expressions.

# Text search
meeting notes              # matches items containing both words

# Type filter
type:note                  # exact type match by name or ID
type:code+                 # type or subtypes (inherited)
type:note,task             # OR: note or task

# Tag filter
tag:todo                   # has tag
tag:todo,urgent            # OR: has todo OR urgent
tag:todo tag:urgent        # AND: has both
#todo                      # shorthand for tag:todo

# Negation
-type:renderer             # exclude type
-tag:archived              # exclude tag
-keyword                   # exclude text

# Field-specific
name:my-lib                # search name field
title:"quoted phrase"      # quoted phrase

# Sort
sort:modified               # most recent first
sort:created                # newest first
sort:name                   # alphabetical
When the query starts with (, it is evaluated as a Hob expression. A macro automatically inserts the item argument into known predicates and wraps the result in a filter/sort pipeline.

# Predicate only (default sort: most recent first)
(type? "note")
(tagged? "todo")
(and (type? "note") (tagged? "todo"))
(name? "kernel")
(text? "meeting notes")

# With sort
(type? "note") (sort :name :asc)
(tagged? "todo") (sort :created)

# Sort only (all items)
(sort :modified)

# Ad-hoc expressions (use i for the item)
(> (.-modified i) 1710000000000)
. All resolve human-readable names to IDs.
Invalid Hob expressions show the error inline in the results area.
Parses a filter-syntax query string into structured filters.
Evaluates parsed filters against an item.
Filters items by query string. Routes to Hob evaluator if query starts with (, otherwise uses the filter syntax.
: Restrict search to attachments of specific container
Returns items tagged with "starred", sorted by most recently modified.
: Restrict to attachments of specific container
Creates a full search interface with:
Hob expression support with inline error display
"Create New" button when no matches found
: Function (item) → HTMLElement — when provided, each result row renders the returned element as inline action buttons instead of being clickable.
Object with performSearch(), getQuery(), setQuery(), destroy()

tokenize.name: tokenize
tokenize.description: Tokenize a query string, respecting quoted phrases

parseQuery.name: parseQuery
parseQuery.description: Parse a query string into structured filters

params.name: caches
params.description: { typeCache: Map<name, id>, tagCache: Map<name, id> }

buildSearchableText.name: buildSearchableText
buildSearchableText.description: Build searchable text from an item

matchesFilters.name: matchesFilters
matchesFilters.description: Check if an item matches the parsed filters

matchesFiltersSync.name: matchesFiltersSync
matchesFiltersSync.description:
Synchronous version of matchesFilters for queries without type hierarchy checks.
Avoids async overhead (400+ sequential awaits) in the common case.

hasFilterSyntax.name: hasFilterSyntax
hasFilterSyntax.description: Check if a query string contains filter syntax

sortResults.name: sortResults
sortResults.description: Sort results by field. Defaults: modified/created descending, name ascending.

isHobQuery.name: isHobQuery
isHobQuery.description: Check if a query is a Hob expression (starts with open paren)

PREDICATE_REGISTRY.name: PREDICATE_REGISTRY
PREDICATE_REGISTRY.description:
Registry of search predicate functions and their expected arity
(including the item argument). If a call has arity-1 args,
the macro inserts `i` as the first argument.

insertItemArg.name: insertItemArg
insertItemArg.description:
Walk a compact JSON AST and insert `i` as the first argument
to known predicate calls that are missing their item argument.

expandSearchMacro.name: expandSearchMacro
expandSearchMacro.description:
Macro-expand a Hob search query into a complete evaluable program.
Input: user's search text (e.g. '(type? "note") (sort :modified)')
Output: Hob source string ready for eval

evaluateHobQuery.name: evaluateHobQuery
evaluateHobQuery.description: Evaluate a Hob search query, returning matching items.

searchItems.name: searchItems
searchItems.description: Search items based on query string

getStarredItems.name: getStarredItems
getStarredItems.description: Get items tagged with "starred", sorted by most recently modified
